overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The player moves along a sidewalk beside a multi-lane road, passing streetlights and palm trees, before turning to face the neon-lit downtown skyline. Heavy rain and green-tinted atmospheric lighting create a moody, cinematic atmosphere characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade beside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk with the waterfront railing on the right and road on the left

entered.detail: tall modern streetlight with bright white LED array illuminating the rain
metal safety railing running along the edge of the waterfront promenade
wet multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines reflecting streetlights
tall palm tree silhouetted against the foggy night sky
faint outlines of futuristic skyscrapers visible through the rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal railing on the right and a multi-lane road on the left. Streetlights cast bright pools of light through the heavy fog and rain, while palm trees and distant building silhouettes are barely visible in the green-tinted gloom.

events.description: red sports car with glowing taillights drives past on the left side of the road
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows become clearly visible through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path as the city skyline becomes more prominent ahead

notable_agents.action: dark sports car driving away from camera with red taillights glowing in the rain

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle with distinctive red taillights moving along the wet road
tall glass and steel building with grid-patterned illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, traffic increases with futuristic vehicles passing on the left. The fog momentarily clears enough to reveal towering glass skyscrapers ahead, their windows forming glowing grids against the dark sky. The palm trees that were distant are now passing by closer to the camera, while the waterfront railing recedes toward the right edge of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown skyline viewpoint overlooking the city

events.description: camera begins turning left to face the downtown skyline directly
view shifts to reveal bright neon billboards and corporate signage on skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: stopping the forward walk and turning to face the illuminated city skyline, taking in the view

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city center
tall vertical corporate advertisement with bright yellow and red neon colors

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a dramatic turn toward the city center. As the camera pivots left, the road and palm trees exit the frame, revealing a breathtaking view of the downtown skyline. Towering glass buildings covered in neon advertisements and corporate logos dominate the view, their lights piercing through the rain and fog. The camera stabilizes facing the illuminated metropolis, ending with a cinematic view of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked waterfront that gradually reveals a towering, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on a concrete promenade, moving forward beside a metal railing and a multi-lane road where streetlights cast bright pools of light through a heavy, green-tinted fog. As the walk continues, the fog momentarily clears to reveal glowing grids of skyscraper windows ahead while futuristic vehicles pass by and palm trees drift closer to the camera. The scene then shifts as the camera pivots left, leaving the road and trees behind to open up a breathtaking view of the downtown skyline. Finally, the view stabilizes on the illuminated city center, where massive glass buildings covered in corporate logos and neon advertisements pierce through the falling rain.
